title: Steri Stumpie Set Pudding
excerpt: Ingredients Steri Stumpie milk, flavour of your choice gelatine Method Fill small serving bowls (as many as needed) or one large jelly mould of your choice with cold water and then pour the water into a measuring cup. This will determine how much Steri Stumpie as well as gelatine you need. …
html:
Ingredients

  • Steri Stumpie milk, flavour of your choice
  • gelatine

Method

Fill small serving bowls (as many as needed) or one large jelly mould of your choice with cold water and then pour the water into a measuring cup.

This will determine how much Steri Stumpie as well as gelatine you need.

Wet your moulds with the water.

Now check the gelatine packet and work out how much you need to properly set that amount of Steri Stumpie.

Measure out the gelatine and sprinkle it over a little cold water in a bowl.

Stir gently and let it stand for a few minutes to sponge.

Heat 250 ml of the Steri Stumpie (it must not boil) and stir in the sponged gelatine until the gelatine has melted.

Add the rest of the (cold) Steri Stumpie and mix thoroughly.

Pour the mixture into your bowls or (wet) jelly mould and place in the fridge for a few hours to set.

Serve in the bowls or unmould and place on a pretty serving platter, garnished with fresh fruit pieces or berries and drizzle generously with a delicious fruit syrup.

Easy!

Tip: If you want to use a fancy jelly mould, then use about 15% more gelatine than the packet recommends.
